# 滴滴主题 `didi`

品牌橙，来自滴滴出行标志色。

## Logo
- 待补充（封面 cover-top 保留部门名文字）

## CSS

```css
:root {
    --primary:       #FF7200;
    --primary-dark:  #CC4C00;
    --primary-light: #FF9438;
    --primary-pale:  #FFF4E8;
    --primary-dim:   rgba(255, 114, 0, 0.12);
    --cover-bg:      linear-gradient(125deg, #7A3000 0%, #CC5000 35%, #FF7200 65%, #FF9A40 100%);
    --section-bg:    linear-gradient(135deg, #7A3000 0%, #CC5000 50%, #FF7200 100%);
    --red:           #E1251B;
    --green:         #00B96B;
    --orange:        #FF7200;
}
.slide-section { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7A3000 0%, #CC5000 50%, #FF7200 100%) !important; }
.slide-qa      { background: linear-gradient(125deg, #7A3000 0%, #CC5000 35%, #FF7200 65%, #FF9A40 100%) !important; }
```
